$surface: In-app help drawer beside /login + marketing-site teaser
$voiceCadence: calm, reassuring, brisk — returning user refresher, not a pitch

storyboard.voiceover: Welcome back. Here's where you sign in.

storyboard.onScreenText: Three steps. Same login every time.
storyboard.voiceover: Email. Password. Sign in. Same fields, every time.
One-tap with Google if your work account is linked. Forgot password resets by email. Stuck? Support is one click away.

keypoints: Sign in with Google — one tap if your work account is linked
Forgot password — reset link by email in under a minute
Trouble signing in? — support@restoreassist.au answers in business hours

storyboard.onScreenText: You land back on your dashboard — claims and inspections waiting.
storyboard.voiceover: You'll land back on your dashboard. Claims and inspections, exactly where you left them.

data.footnote: No re-setup. No re-onboarding. Same workspace, every login.

storyboard.voiceover: RestoreAssist. One National Inspection Standard. Not activated yet? Run /setup first.
